title: DFU - Disconnecting/connecting earbuds to check DFU Pop Up
scenario: Firmware update pop-up "Update currently not available, please try back later" appears when one earbud is disconnected during update, persists on reconnection, and dismisses to Software Update screen
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
2. Navigate to Home screen and ensure both earbuds are connected to the device.
3. Go to Device Settings → [Device Name] → Software Update.
4. Initiate a firmware update for the connected earbuds.
5. While the firmware update is in progress, remove the right earbud and place it in the charge case (disconnect it).
6. Observe the app screen for any pop-up message.
7. Reconnect the right earbud by removing it from the charge case.
8. Observe whether the pop-up persists on screen.
9. Dismiss the pop-up by tapping the appropriate button (e.g., OK, Dismiss, or Close).
10. Verify the screen displayed after dismissal.
11. Repeat steps 4–10, this time disconnecting and reconnecting the left earbud instead of the right.
expected: A pop-up appears stating "Update currently not available, please try back later". The pop-up persists when the earbud is reconnected. Dismissing the pop-up returns the user to the Software Update screen. This behavior is consistent for both right and left earbud disconnection scenarios.
